reviews.review_msg: VERY difficult marker, like many English professors out there. It is ridiculous how low the marks my classmates were receiving. She's a good teacher, very informative and love to socialize to the class. However, her expectations may be too high. That, or what she's conveying is not being interpreted the way she want it to be to the class...

Fantastic professor, for those whoa re already strong in English.  Will spend essentialy unlimited time with her students. VERY nice person.  Hard marker, steer clear if you're not a strong essay writer.  If you don't mind an average grade, she WILL make you a better writer, though.  High standards, but she gets it done.  Best English Prof at SFU.

Great professor.  Hard marker, expects a lot of you, but is willing to give you as much help as you need.  Really nice person, gets very involved with her students.  Cares a LOT about how they do.  Still, hard marker.  If you're confident in English, she's probably the best prof I've had.  If not though, steer clear, she'll kill your GPA.
